series_metadata.series_title: Long Term Care Provider Agreement Files
series_metadata.series_description: Long Term Care facility provider agreements for Medicaid Facilities. Files contain documentation used to support payment/non-payment of services and nursing facilities (NF). Files contain documentation used to support payment/non-payment of services, reflecting changes in facility operations and showing how the agency fulfills its contracts with the federal government to administer the Medicaid program. Includes licenses, cost reports, rate settling reconsiderations and adjustments, adjudication master file, compliance audit findings, pending litigation, complaints about the facility or its patients, facility certification sheets, certification survey packets, operator bankruptcies, exit conferences and facility evaluations, and related correspondence through 2015.
